# MRC GlobalPay

> MRC GlobalPay is a FINTRAC-registered Canadian Money Services Business providing instant, non-custodial cryptocurrency swaps and fiat-to-crypto on-ramp services across 500+ digital assets with a $0.30 minimum. The platform requires no registration, settles transactions in under 60 seconds, and operates 24/7 from its Ottawa headquarters. Buy crypto via PIX, SEPA, or card — or swap any token pair — with zero account creation and full regulatory compliance.
